process.permit_type: PP&D trade permit with plan review
process.description: Fixture-only process model for Portland Permitting & Development trade permit requests that require plan review before permit issuance.

authority_sources.title: Development Hub PDX FAQ
supports: DevHub service categories include permit requests that require plan review, inspection scheduling for online trade permits, correction uploads, and fee payments.

authority_sources.title: Apply for permits online using Development Hub PDX
supports: DevHub application guidance lists trade permits and trade permits with plan review among permit request types.

authority_sources.title: Single PDF Process guidance
supports: Some projects use a Single PDF Process where drawing plans are one searchable PDF and applications, calculations, and supporting documents are separate PDFs.

authority_sources.title: Development Hub PDX account and sign-in guidance
supports: DevHub is Portland's online permitting system and uses PortlandOregon.gov credentials for authenticated online permitting services.

eligibility_rules.subject: applicant
eligibility_rules.action: select trade permit with plan review request type
conditions: project is a trade permit request
project scope requires plan review rather than instant online permit purchase

evidence.quote_or_summary: Public DevHub application guidance identifies trade permits with plan review as an available permit request type.

eligibility_rules.subject: applicant
conditions: online request will be drafted or submitted in DevHub

evidence.quote_or_summary: DevHub uses PortlandOregon.gov credentials for authenticated online permitting services.

required_user_facts.label: Property address or property identifier
required_user_facts.reason: The request must be tied to the correct Portland property before permit scope and review routing can be evaluated.

evidence.quote_or_summary: DevHub permit requests are initiated through request-type workflows for a specific project.

required_user_facts.label: Trade discipline
allowed_values: other trade discipline identified by PP&D
required_user_facts.reason: Trade discipline determines the permit path, review routing, document checklist, and inspection type.

evidence.quote_or_summary: Trade permits and trade permits with plan review are identified as DevHub request types.

required_user_facts.label: Project description and scope of work
required_user_facts.reason: Plan review requires enough scope detail to evaluate submitted plans and route review.

evidence.quote_or_summary: DevHub supports permit requests requiring plan review.

required_user_facts.label: Contractor license or responsible party information
required_user_facts.reason: Trade permit workflows need the responsible applicant or licensed contractor facts before issuance and inspection coordination.

evidence.quote_or_summary: Trade permit request types are submitted through authenticated DevHub workflows.

required_user_facts.label: Applicant contact information
required_user_facts.reason: PP&D must be able to send intake, fee, review, and correction communications.

evidence.quote_or_summary: Authenticated DevHub services are account-based.

required_documents.label: Trade permit application or DevHub request data

evidence.quote_or_summary: The request is made through DevHub as a trade permit with plan review permit type.
When the Single PDF Process applies, drawing plans are one searchable PDF.

required_documents.label: Calculations, equipment schedules, or trade-specific supporting materials
conditional_on: scope requires calculations or equipment data for plan review

evidence.quote_or_summary: Applications, calculations, and supporting documents are separate PDFs in the Single PDF Process.

required_documents.label: Owner, applicant, or contractor authorization when required
conditional_on: applicant is not the owner or responsible licensed contractor

evidence.quote_or_summary: DevHub online permitting services are authenticated and account-scoped.

file_rules.rule: Uploaded plan-review documents must be PDFs unless a later PP&D source authorizes another format.

evidence.quote_or_summary: The public Single PDF Process guidance describes plan, application, calculation, and supporting document submittals as PDFs.

file_rules.rule: When the Single PDF Process applies, combine drawing sheets into one searchable PDF for the plan set.

evidence.quote_or_summary: Drawing plans are one searchable PDF under the Single PDF Process.

file_rules.rule: Applications, calculations, and supporting documents stay separate from the drawing plan PDF.

evidence.quote_or_summary: Applications, calculations, and supporting documents are separate PDFs.

file_rules.rule: Fixture data may describe required uploads but must not include private DevHub session files, traces, screenshots, raw crawl output, or downloaded documents.

evidence.quote_or_summary: Authenticated DevHub services are account-scoped, so fixtures must remain redacted and deterministic.
The applicant must choose the correct DevHub permit request type, including trade permits with plan review where applicable.
DevHub uses PortlandOregon.gov credentials for authenticated services.
Plan drawings, applications, calculations, and supporting documents are organized as PDFs when the Single PDF Process applies.
Trade permits with plan review are DevHub request types.
DevHub supports permit requests requiring plan review and correction uploads.
Permit requests requiring plan review are a DevHub service category.

stages.label: Pay assessed fees only after user confirmation

evidence.quote_or_summary: DevHub FAQ lists fee payments as an online service category.

stages.label: Respond to plan review checksheets or corrections

evidence.quote_or_summary: DevHub FAQ lists correction uploads for permit requests requiring plan review.

stages.label: After issuance, schedule applicable trade inspections

evidence.quote_or_summary: DevHub FAQ lists inspection scheduling for online trade permits.

action_gates.agent_rule: Ask only for missing or ambiguous property, trade discipline, scope, applicant, and responsible-party facts before drafting a trade permit with plan review request.

evidence.quote_or_summary: Correct permit request type selection is required before starting the DevHub request path.

action_gates.agent_rule: Do not automate credential entry, CAPTCHA, MFA, account creation, or password recovery; the user must complete authentication manually or provide an already authorized session.

evidence.quote_or_summary: DevHub uses PortlandOregon.gov credentials for authenticated online permitting services.

action_gates.agent_rule: Before upload, verify that plan-review files are PDFs, drawing plans are a single searchable PDF when that process applies, and supporting documents are separate PDFs.

evidence.quote_or_summary: Drawing plans are one searchable PDF, while applications, calculations, and supporting documents are separate PDFs.

action_gates.agent_rule: Stop before any official upload to DevHub unless the user explicitly confirms the exact upload action for the current session.

evidence.quote_or_summary: DevHub supports permit requests requiring plan review and correction uploads, so uploads are workflow actions with official permit consequences.

action_gates.agent_rule: Stop before submitting the trade permit with plan review request unless the user explicitly confirms submission of that request.

evidence.quote_or_summary: Permit requests requiring plan review are submitted through DevHub service workflows.

action_gates.agent_rule: Stop before paying fees or entering payment details unless the user explicitly confirms the exact payment action.

evidence.quote_or_summary: DevHub FAQ lists fee payments as an online service category.

action_gates.agent_rule: Stop before uploading official plan review corrections unless the user explicitly confirms the exact correction upload action.

evidence.quote_or_summary: DevHub FAQ lists correction uploads for permit requests requiring plan review.

action_gates.agent_rule: After permit issuance, stop before scheduling an inspection unless the user explicitly confirms the exact inspection scheduling action.

evidence.quote_or_summary: DevHub FAQ lists inspection scheduling for online trade permits.

fees.label: PP&D assessed permit and review fees
fees.when_due: when assessed by PP&D or shown in DevHub

evidence.quote_or_summary: DevHub FAQ lists fee payments as an online service category.
DevHub uses PortlandOregon.gov credentials.

external_dependencies.label: PP&D plan review checksheets, approvals, and fee assessment

evidence.quote_or_summary: DevHub supports permit requests requiring plan review and correction uploads.
